Stub implementations for menu layer functions in the Pebble firmware.

# Purpose
This code is a C header file that provides a set of function declarations related to menu layer management in a graphical user interface (GUI) application. The functions are designed to handle various aspects of menu layers, such as drawing menu cells, initializing and deinitializing menu layers, and managing menu layer callbacks. The use of the `WEAK` attribute indicates that these functions are weakly linked, allowing them to be overridden by other implementations if needed. This is useful for providing default behavior that can be customized in specific applications.

The file includes headers for `menu_layer.h` and `attributes.h`, which suggests dependencies on other components for menu layer structures and attribute handling. The functions cover a range of operations, including creating and destroying menu layers, setting callbacks, and configuring click interactions. The presence of functions like `menu_layer_get_layer` and `menu_layer_get_scroll_layer` indicates that the code provides access to underlying layer structures, facilitating integration with other GUI components. The file does not define any public APIs or external interfaces directly but serves as a foundational component for building and managing menu layers within an application.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `applib/ui/menu_layer.h`
- `util/attributes.h`

### menu\_cell\_basic\_draw<!-- {{#callable:menu_cell_basic_draw}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../tests/stubs/stubs_menu_layer.h#L22>)

Provides a placeholder for drawing a basic menu cell with a title, subtitle, and icon.
- **Inputs**:
    - ``ctx``: A pointer to the `GContext` used for drawing operations.
    - ``cell_layer``: A pointer to the `Layer` representing the menu cell to draw.
    - ``title``: A string representing the title text of the menu cell.
    - ``subtitle``: A string representing the subtitle text of the menu cell.
    - ``icon``: A pointer to a `GBitmap` representing the icon to display in the menu cell.

[View Source →](<../../../../tests/stubs/stubs_menu_layer.h#L55>)
